content.full_text:
October 1, 1992

Bianca Breeze
Council Legal Division FPPC

Re: Becky Rishe Candidate Rohnert Park City Council
California Community Development & Housing Act/
Redevelopment Agencies/Conflict of Interest

Dear Ms. Breeze:

This comes to request a written documentation per our
conversation Thursday, October 1,1992, regarding any
conflict of interest with a community development loan I
received in late 1990 and my attaining council status in
1992.

I thank you very much for your time and energies in
helping me clear this grey area.

Enclosed please find a stamped self addressed envelope
and again thank you for being there and returning my call so
promptly.

Yours sincerely,

Becky Rishe

BR/enclosure

sections.question: Regarding any conflict of interest with a community development loan I received in late 1990 and my attaining council status in 1992.
sections.question_synthetic: Does a community development loan received in late 1990 create a conflict of interest for someone seeking or attaining city council status in 1992?
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a candidate to FPPC, not an FPPC response/advice letter. No CONCLUSION or SHORT ANSWER section present. Date discrepancy noted (October 1 header vs October 7 reference in text). Document appears to be a follow-up to a prior telephone conversation.

embedding.summary: Becky Rishe, a candidate for Rohnert Park City Council, requests written documentation from FPPC regarding potential conflicts of interest between a community development loan she received in late 1990 and her 1992 council candidacy.
